title: Live Updates: Early U.K. Election Results Point to Big Losses for Starmer’s Party
summary_full: With votes still being tallied in thousands of local races, Prime Minister Keir Starmer took responsibility for large Labour Party losses of council seats but insisted he would not resign.
summary_public: With votes still being tallied in thousands of local races, Prime Minister Keir Starmer took responsibility for large Labour Party losses of council seats but insisted he would not resign.
